summary: The dark-mode diff is strongly aligned with both guides. Backend-guide: it adds no business-logic surface — the only Ruby is ThemeHelper#dark_theme?, a presentation helper reading cookies[:theme] (correctly NOT a service, per 'business logic lives in POROs; models/services own business actions, helpers own view logic'); no controllers, models, callbacks, or jobs were touched. UI-style-guide §Color is followed to the letter: neutrals are centralized as @theme/.dark CSS custom-property tokens (bg-app/bg-surface/text-default/border-default/...) with a class-based @custom-variant dark; a repo-wide scan shows zero raw bg-white/bg-gray-*/text-gray-*/border-gray-*/divide-gray-*/ring-gray- left in any view. Status colors remain a single source of truth in StatusHelper::TONE_CLASSES and use exactly the guide's soft-badge + dark pattern (dark:bg-{c}-500/10 dark:text-{c}-400 dark:ring-{c}-400/20), with the status word always rendered so meaning never rides on color alone (§Accessibility). The icon-only toggle carries aria-label + title tooltip (§Core components). Tests use Minitest — a helper unit test plus a system test covering the critical toggle/persist flow (§Testing). The guide itself was updated in the same PR (CLAUDE.md mandate). One minor deviation: the new theme-toggle button uses focus-visible:outline-* instead of the guide's canonical focus-visible:ring-2 ring-indigo-600, which every other interactive element in the app follows.

findings.issue: The toggle button's focus indicator is `focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-indigo-600`, which deviates from ui-style-guide.md §Accessibility baseline ('visible focus ring (`focus-visible:ring-2 ring-indigo-600`)') and §Buttons. Every other interactive element in the app uses the ring pattern (e.g. sign-in button uses `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-600`; all form inputs use `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-600`). A focus indicator IS present so this is not an a11y regression, but it breaks the guide's stated focus convention and app-wide consistency. Change to `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-600` (with `focus:outline-none`/`focus-visible:ring-inset` as used elsewhere) to match.
